title: Phonics
subject: Language Arts
description: Letter sounds, blends, rhyming words, and vowels
curriculum: Jamaica NSC Grade 2 - Language Arts Strand: Word Recognition & Vocabulary (Phonemic Awareness, Phonics)
nscObjectives: Blend and segment phonemes in words
Recognize consonant blends (bl, cl, st, tr, etc.)
Distinguish short and long vowel sounds
Apply phonics skills to read new words

sections.name: Beginning Sounds
sections.instruction: Choose the word that begins with the same sound.

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'ball'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'b' sound at the start!

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'fish'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'f' sound at the start!

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'tree'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 't' sound at the start!

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'map'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'm' sound!

sections.name: Digraphs (sh, ch, th)
sections.instruction: Digraphs are two letters that make one sound.

questions.hint: Sh makes the sound in 'shh, be quiet!'
Ch makes the sound at the start of 'choo-choo train'!
Th makes the sound when you stick out your tongue a little!
The 'sh' can be at the end too!

sections.name: Rhyming Words
sections.instruction: Rhyming words have the same ending sound.

questions.hint: Cat ends in -at. Find another -at word!
Sun ends in -un. Which other word ends in -un?
Hill ends in -ill. Find the word that sounds the same!
Bed ends in -ed. Which word also ends in -ed?
Ring ends in -ing!

sections.name: Short Vowel Sounds
sections.instruction: Choose the correct vowel (a, e, i, o, u) to complete each word.

questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'cat'!
Think of the sound in the middle of 'pig'!
Think of the sound in the middle of 'bed'!

questions.prompt: s _ n (it shines in the sky)
questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'sun'!
Think of the sound in the middle of 'dog'!

sections.name: Consonant Blends
sections.instruction: Blends are two consonants that work together (bl, cl, st, tr, etc.)

questions.hint: Say 'block' slowly. What sound do you hear at the start?
Clap your hands! What sound starts that word?

questions.prompt: ___ar (you can see it in the sky at night)
questions.hint: Stars twinkle at night!
A tree has leaves and branches!
This animal says 'ribbit'!

sections.name: Long and Short Vowels
sections.instruction: Long vowels say their name (like 'a' in 'cake'). Short vowels make a quick sound (like 'a' in 'cat').

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'A' says 'ay' in the long sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'I' says 'eye' in the long sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'O' says 'oh' in the long sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a SHORT vowel sound?
questions.hint: Short vowels make a quick sound, like 'ah' in cat.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: The 'u' in cute says its name - 'you'!

sections.name: Ending Sounds
sections.instruction: Listen to the last sound in each word.

questions.prompt: What letter do you hear at the END of 'dog'?
questions.hint: Say 'dog' slowly. What's the last sound?

questions.prompt: What letter do you hear at the END of 'bus'?
questions.hint: Say 'bus' slowly. What's the last sound?

questions.prompt: What letter do you hear at the END of 'rib'?
questions.hint: Say 'rib' slowly. What's the last sound?

questions.prompt: What letter do you hear at the END of 'jam'?
questions.hint: Say 'jam' slowly. What's the last sound?
